textNodes.text: Premium residential and commercial painting, delivered with careful preparation, honest advice and a finish we’re proud to put our name on.
From one carefully refreshed room to a complete commercial transformation, our experienced team brings the same care to every job.
Thoughtful interior and exterior finishes that make home feel new again.
Flexible, low-disruption painting for offices, retail, strata and more.
Detailed preparation and durable finishes, inside and out.
Clean, repair, seal and coat for stronger weather protection.
Stains and coatings designed to stand up to Melbourne weather.
Clear, confident colour choices that work with your architecture.
Smooth, modern finishes for cabinetry, doors and detailed surfaces.
Plaster, weatherboard and light timber repairs before we paint.
Professional finishes, clear communication and scheduling built around your operation—from a single office to multi-site projects.
Explore the care behind every edge, every surface and every final coat. Hover a project to reveal the colour beneath.
We listen, prepare properly and communicate clearly. It’s how we deliver polished, durable work—without turning your home or workplace upside down.
Your property and peace of mind are protected.
Proven Australian paint systems for lasting results.
Clear schedules, prompt arrivals and no loose ends.
Careful protection, tidy sites and a spotless handover.
Based in Melbourne and proudly servicing homes and businesses across the south-east and surrounding suburbs.
I’m truly amazed by their quality of work and dedication. The painters were courteous, friendly and completed outstanding paintwork in a short time.

textNodes.text: Superior Plus Painting is a Melbourne-based team dedicated to high-quality residential and commercial painting with reliable service, honest communication and respect for every property.

From small residential touch-ups to complete home repaints and large commercial projects, we approach every job with professionalism, honesty and pride. We inspect and prepare each surface, protect surrounding areas and use professional application techniques for a smooth, durable finish.
We understand that your property is one of your most valuable investments. That is why clear communication, reliable scheduling and a clean handover matter just as much as the paint itself.
Superior Plus has grown through practical local promotion, direct client relationships and work that can be seen across Melbourne homes and businesses.
Original client-supplied promotional artwork retained as part of the company archive.

our-process.description: Discover Superior Plus Painting’s six-step process for careful preparation, premium application and a clean final handover.

headings.text: Our painting process planned down to the detail.
Simple for you. Meticulous from us.

sections.heading: Our painting process planned down to the detail.
Simple for you. Meticulous from us.
Preparation protects the final result.
Ready to start the process?

textNodes.text: A proven path to a better finish
Outstanding painting starts with careful planning, detailed preparation and clear communication. Our six-step process keeps every residential and commercial project organised from quote to handover.
We inspect the site, understand your goals, discuss colours and finishes, and provide a detailed no-obligation quotation.
We clean, scrape, sand, fill, repair, seal and prime as required to create the right foundation.
Furniture, floors, windows, gardens and surrounding areas are carefully covered and masked.
Premium coatings are applied with brushes, rollers or spray equipment using proven techniques.
Every surface is checked and any required touch-ups are completed before sign-off.
We remove coverings, clean the work area and complete a final walkthrough with you.
Tell us about your property and we’ll arrange a free, no-obligation quotation.
Premium residential and commercial painting across Melbourne, with care in every coat.

All services

faqs.question: Do you provide free quotes?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide free, no-obligation quotes across Melbourne, including a project inspection, discussion of your requirements and a detailed written quotation.

faqs.question: What areas do you service?
faqs.answer: We service Melbourne and surrounding suburbs including Chadstone, Mount Waverley, Glen Waverley, Oakleigh, Mulgrave, Clayton, Dandenong, Berwick, Narre Warren and Endeavour Hills.

faqs.question: Are you fully insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Superior Plus Painting is fully insured, giving you confidence that your property is protected throughout the project.

faqs.question: What painting services do you offer?
faqs.answer: We provide residential, commercial, interior, exterior, roof and fence painting, deck painting and staining, plaster repairs, wallpaper removal and related preparation services.

faqs.question: How long will my project take?
faqs.answer: Timing depends on the property size and surface condition. Most residential projects take several days to two weeks. We provide an estimated schedule before work begins.

faqs.question: Do I need to move my furniture?
faqs.answer: We recommend removing smaller personal items. Our team carefully protects furniture, flooring and fixtures before painting begins.

faqs.question: Can you repair walls before painting?
faqs.answer: Yes. We repair suitable plaster damage, fill cracks and holes, sand surfaces and prepare walls for a smooth professional finish.

faqs.question: What type of paint do you use?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality paint systems from trusted manufacturers and recommend products based on the surface, expected wear and your budget.

faqs.question: Do you clean up after the project?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We remove masking and coverings, leave the property tidy and complete a final inspection before handover.

faqs.question: How do I book my project?
faqs.answer: Contact us to arrange a free consultation. Once you approve the written quotation, we schedule the project for a suitable time.

textNodes.text: Painting for the way you live

Superior Plus Painting provides professional residential painting across Melbourne for homeowners, landlords, builders and property managers. From a complete repaint to one carefully refreshed space, we deliver finishes that enhance the beauty, value and protection of your home.
Every quote is tailored to the property, surface condition and finish you want to achieve.

Every project begins with a thorough inspection. We repair minor defects, fill cracks, sand surfaces and protect your furniture and flooring before applying high-quality coatings for a smooth, durable finish.

textNodes.text: Bring outdoor timber back to life
We restore, protect and enhance Melbourne decks and outdoor timber. Regular maintenance helps timber stand up to sunlight, rain, moisture and foot traffic while preserving its natural character.
Every quote is tailored to the property, surface condition and finish you want to achieve.
Professional equipment, quality products and methodical preparation help create a durable result that suits the timber and Melbourne’s changing weather.
Clean dirt, mould and old coatings
Preparation and coating work for pergolas, covered outdoor areas and suitable exterior timber.
Brush, spray and stain finishes for new and weathered fences.
Durable protection and renewed street appeal for Melbourne properties.
Complete home repaints, interior refreshes and exterior transformations.

textNodes.text: A clean start for your walls

Professional wallpaper removal protects the plaster underneath and creates the smooth foundation required for a quality repaint. We remove old coverings, adhesive residue and minor surface damage with care.

textNodes.text: Damaged plaster affects both the appearance and durability of a painted finish. We restore walls and ceilings across Melbourne so surfaces are smooth, strong and properly prepared for painting.
Every quote is tailored to the property, surface condition and finish you want to achieve.
Because quality painting starts with a stable, even surface, we take time to complete repairs correctly and blend them cleanly into the surrounding wall or ceiling.
